scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix docs --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: npm run build:docs && npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:split: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:docs"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix docs && npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf frontend/dist/docs && cp -r docs/.vitepress/dist frontend/dist/docs && touch frontend/dist/.nojekyll
